assertions.summary: The canonical docs spine still defines `docs/INDEX.md` as the entrypoint, links the current module and flow inventories from that spine, and classifies the three retained top-level docs as reference-only in both `docs/INDEX.md` and `docs/deprecated/INDEX.md`. When opened directly, `docs/ACCOUNTING_PORTAL_SCOPE_GUARDRAIL.md`, `docs/AUDIT_TRAIL_OWNERSHIP.md`, and `docs/accounting-portal-endpoint-map.md` now each carry matching top-of-file NON-CANONICAL / REFERENCE ONLY banners and replacement guidance, so the previously failing direct-open mismatch is resolved.
evidence: docs/INDEX.md:5 defines the canonical docs spine boundary; docs/INDEX.md:46 and docs/INDEX.md:73 link the canonical module and flow inventories.
docs/INDEX.md:173-175 classifies ACCOUNTING_PORTAL_SCOPE_GUARDRAIL.md, AUDIT_TRAIL_OWNERSHIP.md, and accounting-portal-endpoint-map.md as reference-only retained docs with canonical replacements.
docs/deprecated/INDEX.md:162-164 repeats the same three docs as historical/non-canonical reference surfaces with their replacement paths.
docs/ACCOUNTING_PORTAL_SCOPE_GUARDRAIL.md:3 and docs/ACCOUNTING_PORTAL_SCOPE_GUARDRAIL.md:8 show a top-of-file NON-CANONICAL / REFERENCE ONLY banner and reference-only status note.
docs/AUDIT_TRAIL_OWNERSHIP.md:3 and docs/AUDIT_TRAIL_OWNERSHIP.md:8 show a top-of-file NON-CANONICAL / REFERENCE ONLY banner and reference-only status note.
docs/accounting-portal-endpoint-map.md:3 and docs/accounting-portal-endpoint-map.md:8 show a top-of-file NON-CANONICAL / REFERENCE ONLY banner and reference-only status note.
